/projects/opt/x86_64/gcc/9.2.0/bin/gcc -std=c99 -DHAVE_MPI=1 -O3 -DNDEBUG -g -O3 -g -O3  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/L7Test.dir/L7Test.c.o CMakeFiles/L7Test.dir/update_test.c.o CMakeFiles/L7Test.dir/reduction_test.c.o CMakeFiles/L7Test.dir/broadcast_test.c.o  -o L7Test -Wl,-rpath,/projects/opt/x86_64/openmpi/4.0.2-gcc_9.2.0/lib ../libl7.a /projects/opt/x86_64/openmpi/4.0.2-gcc_9.2.0/lib/libmpi.so
